description_long: This is a pair of classic, full-rim sunglasses with a bold, rectangular frame and slightly rounded edges, reminiscent of the iconic Wayfarer style. The frame is thick and solid, with a smooth, glossy finish that gives it a modern and stylish appearance. The lenses are dark-tinted, providing substantial coverage and privacy, and are set flush within the frame. The temples are straight and robust, featuring a subtle curve at the ends for a secure fit behind the ears. A small, white brand logo is visible on the outer side of both temples, adding a touch of distinction. The bridge is wide and integrated seamlessly into the frame, offering both comfort and structural integrity.
description: A pair of classic, rectangular sunglasses with a thick, glossy black frame and dark-tinted lenses, featuring a visible brand logo on the temples.
description_view_0: Front three-quarter view showing the bold, rectangular frame, dark lenses, and the left temple with a visible brand logo.
description_view_1: Rear three-quarter view highlighting the inside of the frame and the right temple, with the logo visible and the curvature of the temples apparent.
description_view_2: Top-down rear view emphasizing the straight temples, the bridge, and the overall symmetry of the frame.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the right temple, the thickness of the frame, and the prominent brand logo.
attribute_frame_design: Rectangular, full-rim frame with thick, straight temples and slightly rounded lens edges; the frame is bold and solid, with a smooth, continuous structure and no visible embellishments except for the logo.
attribute_lens_tint: Lenses are dark gray to black, fully opaque with no visible gradient or special effects; they appear uniformly tinted and provide strong sun protection.
attribute_bridge_style: Integrated saddle-style bridge, wide and smoothly contoured, forming a continuous part of the frame without separate nose pads.
attribute_temple_detailing: Temples are straight, thick, and unadorned except for a small, white brand logo near the hinge; the ends are gently curved for comfort.
attribute_brand_logo: A white printed brand logo is visible on the outer side of both temples near the hinges.
